title: FGVmeMoriEsDYU
description: This mod tries to give the experience of the old mystical versions.
body:
# Welcome to the unknown
FGVmeMoriEsDYU is a slow-burn horror mod inspired by mystical versions of Minecraft. It aims to recreate the eerie atmosphere of old Minecraft, with various events capable of inducing paranoia.

<details>
<summary>Brief description</summary>

Various events related not only to the game world, but also to the player.

</details>





Please note that some events may not appear!
- The mod uses a modified world generator [Cascades](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hybrid-beta)
- The mod uses textures [Classic Aspect ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-aspect)
- The mod uses a resource pack [Classic Fog](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-fog)
- The mod page was inspired by the mod [MhFFa30109](https://modrinth.com/mod/mhffa30109)
